system_prompt: You are an OpenFOAM debugging planner. Given current foam files, error logs and reviewer analysis, create a minimal rewrite plan. Output MUST be strict JSON only, with this exact schema: {"target_files": [{"file": "relative/path", "changes": "change1; change2"}]}. Rules: 1) Do not use markdown, backticks, or comments. 2) Use double quotes for all strings. 3) In changes, use short plain text actions separated by semicolons. 4) Do not include parentheses, backticks, or quote characters inside changes text. 5) Do not include run steps; only file edits.
user_prompt:
<foamfiles>list_foamfile=[FoamfilePydantic(file_name='controlDict', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      controlDict;
}

application     pimpleFoam;

startFrom       startTime;

startTime       0;

stopAt          endTime;

endTime         0.5;

deltaT          0.0025;

writeControl    runTime;

writeInterval   0.05;

purgeWrite      0;

writeFormat     ascii;

writePrecision  6;

writeCompression off;

timeFormat      general;

timePrecision   6;

runTimeModifiable true;'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='fvSchemes', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      fvSchemes;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

ddtSchemes
{
    default         Euler;
}

gradSchemes
{
    default         Gauss linear;
    grad(p)         Gauss linear;
    grad(U)         Gauss linear;
}

divSchemes
{
    default         none;
    div(phi,U)      Gauss linearUpwind grad(U);
    div((nuEff*dev2(T(grad(U))))) Gauss linear;
}

laplacianSchemes
{
    default         Gauss linear corrected;
}

interpolationSchemes
{
    default         linear;
}

snGradSchemes
{
    default         corrected;
}

wallDist
{
    method          meshWave;
}

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='fvSolution', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      fvSolution;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

solvers
{
    p
    {
        solver          GAMG;
        tolerance       1e-06;
        relTol          0.01;
        smoother        GaussSeidel;
    }

    pFinal
    {
        $p;
        relTol          0;
    }

    U
    {
        solver          smoothSolver;
        smoother        symGaussSeidel;
        tolerance       1e-06;
        relTol          0.01;
    }

    UFinal
    {
        $U;
        relTol          0;
    }
}

PIMPLE
{
    nOuterCorrectors    2;
    nCorrectors         1;
    nNonOrthogonalCorrectors 0;

    momentumPredictor   yes;
}

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='U', folder_name='0', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       volVectorField;
    object      U;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

dimensions      [0 1 -1 0 0 0 0];

internalField   uniform (0 0 0);

boundaryField
{
    inlet
    {
        type            fixedValue;
        value           uniform (1.5 0 0);
    }

    outlet
    {
        type            zeroGradient;
    }

    top
    {
        type            noSlip;
    }

    bottom
    {
        type            noSlip;
    }

    frontAndBack
    {
        type            empty;
    }
}

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='p', folder_name='0', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       volScalarField;
    object      p;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

dimensions      [0 2 -2 0 0 0 0];

internalField   uniform 0;

boundaryField
{
    inlet
    {
        type            zeroGradient;
    }

    outlet
    {
        type            fixedValue;
        value           uniform 0;
    }

    top
    {
        type            zeroGradient;
    }

    bottom
    {
        type            zeroGradient;
    }

    frontAndBack
    {
        type            empty;
    }
}

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='momentumTransport', folder_name='constant', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      momentumTransport;
}

simulationType  laminar;

laminar
{
    laminarModel    generalizedNewtonian;

    generalizedNewtonianCoeffs
    {
        viscosityModel  CrossPowerLaw;

        nuInf           10;
        m               0.4;
        n               3;
        tauStar         1;
        nu              nu [ 0 2 -1 0 0 0 0 ] 1e-02;
    }
}'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='physicalProperties', folder_name='constant', content='FoamFile

nu              1e-02;

nuInf           10;
m               0.4;
n               3;
'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='blockMeshDict', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile

// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

scale   1;

vertices
(
    // Front face (z = 0)
    (-1 -0.25 0)    // 0
    (1 -0.25 0)     // 1
    (1 0.25 0)      // 2
    (-1 0.25 0)     // 3

    // Back face (z = 0.1)
    (-1 -0.25 0.1)  // 4
    (1 -0.25 0.1)   // 5
    (1 0.25 0.1)    // 6
    (-1 0.25 0.1)   // 7
);

blocks
(
    hex (0 1 2 3 4 5 6 7) (60 40 1) simpleGrading (1 1 1)
);

edges
(
);

boundary
(
    inlet
    {
        type patch;
        faces
        (
            (0 3 7 4)
        );
    }
    outlet
    {
        type patch;
        faces
        (
            (1 2 6 5)
        );
    }
    top
    {
        type wall;
        faces
        (
            (3 2 6 7)
        );
    }
    bottom
    {
        type wall;
        faces
        (
            (0 4 5 1)
        );
    }
);

mergePatchPairs
(
);

<error_logs>[{'file': 'log.pimpleFoam', 'error_content': 'ERROR: 
Unknown viscosity model CrossPowerLaw

Valid viscosity models are : 

2
(
Newtonian
constant
)


    From function static Foam::autoPtr<Foam::viscosityModel> Foam::viscosityModel::New(const Foam::fvMesh&, const Foam::word&)
    in file viscosityModels/viscosityModel/viscosityModelNew.C at line 58.

FOAM exiting'}]</error_logs>
<review_analysis># Error Analysis and Resolution

## Error: Unknown viscosity model CrossPowerLaw

**Error Message:**
```
Unknown viscosity model CrossPowerLaw

Valid viscosity models are :
2
(
Newtonian
constant
)
```

**Diagnosis:**

The error is clear and straightforward. The `generalizedNewtonian` laminar model in this version of OpenFOAM (OpenFOAM Foundation, likely v2.0 based on the file paths) only supports two viscosity models: `Newtonian` and `constant`. The `CrossPowerLaw` viscosity model is **not available** under this name in the `generalizedNewtonian` framework for this version.

In older versions of OpenFOAM, the Cross Power Law model was implemented differently — either as a standalone model accessed through `viscosityModel` directly (not via `generalizedNewtonian`), or under a different name altogether.

**The Fix:**

Since the user requirement specifies a `CrossPowerLaw` viscosity model with parameters `nuInf=10, m=0.4, n=3`, and the goal is to use a generalized Newtonian model, the approach is to **bypass the `generalizedNewtonian` wrapper** and specify the `CrossPowerLaw` viscosity model directly within the `laminar` transport model. Additionally, the `tauStar` parameter appears to be unnecessary for this model variant.

**Changes needed in `constant/momentumTransport`:**

Replace the current `generalizedNewtonian` configuration with a direct `CrossPowerLaw` viscosity model specification:

```
simulationType  laminar;

laminar
{
    laminarModel    CrossPowerLaw;

    CrossPowerLawCoeffs
    {
        nuInf           10;
        m               0.4;
        n               3;
        nu              nu [ 0 2 -1 0 0 0 0 ] 1e-02;
    }
}
```

If the solver still complains about `CrossPowerLaw` not being found in this context, the alternative approach is to use the `constant` viscosity model with `nu 1e-02` (as also specified in `physicalProperties`), since the user states "use constant viscosity model with nu value of 1e-02". In that case, simplify `momentumTransport` to:

```
simulationType  laminar;

laminar
{
    laminarModel    constant;

    constantCoeffs
    {
        nu              1e-02;
    }
}
```

And rely solely on `constant/physicalProperties` for the `nu` and `nuInf` values. However, given that the user explicitly requests `CrossPowerLaw`, the first approach above should work if the `CrossPowerLaw` model is supported at the top level of the `laminar` dictionary (some versions place it there). If neither works, the fallback is to use `generalizedNewtonian` with a `Newtonian` sub-model — but this would ignore the user's explicit CrossPowerLaw request.

**Priority Recommendation:** Try the first approach — set `laminarModel` to `CrossPowerLaw` directly and place the coefficients (`nuInf`, `m`, `n`, `nu`) inside a `CrossPowerLawCoeffs` sub-dictionary. This is the standard format for specifying viscosity models in newer versions of OpenFOAM. If that fails, fall back to the `constant` model approach while still reading `nu` from `physicalProperties`.</review_analysis>
<user_requirement>do a laminar offsetcylinder simulation. Use PIMPLE algorithm with a generalized Newtonian model and Cross-Power-Law viscosity for momentum transport, characterized by specific parameters nuInf=10, m=0.4, n=3. Boundary conditions specify a fixed velocity of 1.5m/s at the inlet (left),zero gradient pressure at the outlet (right), and no-slip conditions for walls, including the cylinder surface. Use timestep of 0.0025 and output every 0.05. Finaltime is 0.5. use constant viscosity model with nu value of 1e-02 in physical properties.</user_requirement>
Return strict JSON now with key target_files only.
response: target_files=[PlannedFileChange(file='constant/momentumTransport', changes='Replace generalizedNewtonian model with direct CrossPowerLaw laminarModel; Move nuInf, m, n, nu parameters into a CrossPowerLawCoeffs sub-dictionary inside the laminar sub-dictionary; Remove the generalizedNewtonianCoeffs sub-dictionary')]
